title: Model Lab Map Overlay Fix and Nonblocking Layout Polish

removed_fixed_overlay_card_details.replacement: Small noninteractive Model Lab map badge showing overlay on/off and Internal only status.

research_overlay_implementation.visualization: Capped centroid marker layer using safe internal model research preview records.
research_overlay_implementation.camera_behavior: When markers load, Model Lab mode fits the map to the safe marker extent so the preview is visible.

model_lab_left_panel_changes.toggle_copy_updated: Explains that the overlay draws capped, probability-free research markers.

model_lab_right_panel_changes.no_selection_state: Aggregate Model Lab Intelligence with overlay status, model metrics, and safety caveats.
model_lab_right_panel_changes.selection_state: Selected Research Context with safe signal label, band, drivers, model version, data quality, and caveat.

snapshot_integration.model_lab_caveat_added: Model Lab snapshot includes internal research context only. No exact parcel probabilities or official scores are shown.

safety_verification.frontend_dom_probability_field_check: No prediction_probability, experimental_probability, or exact_probability text appeared during browser smoke.
safety_verification.code_search_note: Forbidden terms remain only in backend schemas/internal mapping/guardrail hooks where safety flags are false or internal ranking classes are translated to safe labels.

validation_results.python_m_pytest: timed out after approximately 244 seconds without a reported assertion failure
validation_results.npm_run_dev_cfs: restarted local CFS services; command timed out because the launcher keeps services running after startup

browser_smoke_results.browser_console_note: One minified map/runtime error message 'r' was captured during smoke testing; the app remained functional and no CFS UI failure was observed.

remaining_known_limitations: The research preview uses centroid markers rather than parcel polygons.
The overlay depends on existing internal ranking/explanation tables; if those tables are absent, the endpoint returns preview_available=false instead of fake data.
Full pytest did not complete within the allotted validation window.
The safe preview endpoint returns false exact_probability_available flags as explicit safety metadata, but no exact probability values or raw scores.
